claim_scope: train/val-only method-line candidate; no test access before D5 freeze
core_hypothesis: Static aux 2.0 supplies a stable auxiliary budget while branch-relative DWA reallocates only text/image/fusion auxiliary supervision; final CE remains outside DWA.

implementation.branch_relative_dwa: softmax(current_aux_loss / previous_aux_loss / adwa_tau) over text/image/fusion only
implementation.final_guard: fallback to uniform branch weights if current final loss exceeds previous final loss by adwa_final_guard_ratio

go_no_go.d3_5: finite nonzero gradients reach h_final/final_classifier, branch features, and aux heads; final CE remains outside DWA
go_no_go.d4: best ADWA seed42 5-epoch val Macro-F1/Acc must beat both static aux 2.0 and generic DWA controls
go_no_go.d5: only if D4 passes; three seed val mean must beat static aux 2.0 and generic DWA, with at least two seeds beating the per-seed best strong control
